title: 1. Differentiation
content:
« Previous | Next »
Introduction Given a value – the price of gas, the pressure in a tank, or your distance from Boston – how can we describe changes in that value? Differentiation is a valuable technique for answering questions like this.
Part A: Definition and Basic Rules
